inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the object resting on the surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the object resting on the surface.

inputs.label: Angle of Incline
inputs.businessContext: Inclination angle of the surface measured from horizontal. Use 0 for flat surfaces.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inclination angle of the surface measured from horizontal. Use 0 for flat surfaces.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzeyin yataydan ölçülen eğim açısı. Düz yüzeyler için 0 kullanın.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Static Friction
inputs.businessContext: μ_s – used when the object is stationary to determine the maximum static friction before motion starts.

businessContext_i18n.en: μ_s – used when the object is stationary to determine the maximum static friction before motion starts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: μ_s – nesne hareketsizken, hareket başlamadan önceki maksimum statik sürtünmeyi belirlemek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Kinetic Friction
inputs.businessContext: μ_k – used when the object is sliding to determine the kinetic friction force.

businessContext_i18n.en: μ_k – used when the object is sliding to determine the kinetic friction force.
businessContext_i18n.tr: μ_k – nesne kayarken kinetik sürtünme kuvvetini belirlemek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Gravitational Acceleration
inputs.businessContext: Standard acceleration due to gravity on Earth. Adjust for different planets if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard acceleration due to gravity on Earth. Adjust for different planets if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dünya'da standart yerçekimi ivmesi. Gerekirse diğer gezegenler için ayarlayın.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety multiplier applied to the maximum static friction for engineering calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety multiplier applied to the maximum static friction for engineering calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik hesaplamaları için maksimum statik sürtünmeye uygulanan tasarım güvenlik çarpanı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
